title: funsite
text:
This is a Quarto website.
To learn more about Quarto websites visit https://quarto.org/docs/websites.

# 1. Set up a blank canvas
plot(NULL, xlim=c(-2, 2), ylim=c(-2, 2), asp=1,
     axes=FALSE, xlab="", ylab="", main="Base R Smiley Face")

# 2. Draw the main head (yellow circle)
symbols(0, 0, circles=1.5, bg="yellow", fg="black", inches=FALSE, add=TRUE, lwd=2)

# 3. Draw the eyes (black filled circles)
points(c(-0.5, 0.5), c(0.4, 0.4), pch=16, cex=3, col="black")

# 4. Generate data points for a smooth curved smile
smile_x <- seq(-0.7, 0.7, length.out=100)
smile_y <- 0.8 * (smile_x^2) - 0.6  # Parabolic curve equation

# 5. Draw the smile line
lines(smile_x, smile_y, col="black", lwd=4)
